title: Zolmo
description: Development of a customized website for the independent real estate broker Zolmo, focusing on showcasing high-end properties and gated communities. Implementation of UI/UX techniques to highlight the client's unique selling points.

title: Summary Component
description: I solved the challenge of building a summary component according to a specific design, using front-end practices and ensuring a responsive experience for users. Additionally, the component is interactive, ensuring that the results and total score were updated automatically.

title: Login Page
description: This project involves the creation of a login authenticator with a user interface similar to the popular streaming platform Netflix. The goal was to develop an intuitive and attractive login system, providing users with a familiar and enjoyable experience.

title: Task List
description: This project involves creating an interactive task list where users can add new tasks, delete existing tasks, and mark tasks as completed. The goal is to provide a simple and effective tool for managing daily activities in an organized manner.
